violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Many opened boxes found on floor in walk-in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Many items throughout kitchen found undated.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Bottom of prep cooler found very wet with food, needs to be cleaned.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
